taskTemplate.name: Review Appraisal
taskTemplate.description: Review appraisal report and address underwriting conditions

subTaskTemplate.name: Transfer Appraisal from Value Link
subTaskTemplate.description: Transfer Appraisal from Value Link – Transfer Appraisal from Value Link; save CrossCheck results in ValueLink prior to marking complete.
subTaskTemplate.type: Review Appraisal – Transfer Appraisal from Value Link

subTaskTemplate.name: External Review
subTaskTemplate.description: External Review – Document external review of appraisal. If an external review was not completed, mark as Issue — this will trigger the need for an internal second review. This task will auto-complete when the external review is confirmed completed.

subTaskTemplate.name: Second Review
subTaskTemplate.description: Second Review – Document internal second review of appraisal. Added when external review was not completed. Confirm second review findings are documented before marking complete.

subTaskTemplate.name: Attach Appraisal Review Form
subTaskTemplate.description: Attach Appraisal Review Form – Attach completed appraisal review form to the file. Added once second review is complete.
subTaskTemplate.type: Review Appraisal – Attach Appraisal Review Form
